sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33843" key="e)/lliqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔλλῐθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33843.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing a precious stone</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δακτυλίδιον</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:2199" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2199</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> <date TEIform="date">(iv A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
